word: G309 - ἀνάβλεψις - anáblepsis - an-ab'-lep-sis - Recovery of sight

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνάβλεψις

- Transliteration: Anablepsis

- Phonetic: an-ab'-lep-sis

- Definition:

1. recovery of sight

- Origin: from G308

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G308; restoration of sight: - recovering of sight.
